Metadata.title: {name}'s Portfolio
Metadata.description: Personal portfolio of a Web Developer.

Hero.description: I build efficient, scalable, and user-friendly web applications. From task management systems to government procurement platforms, I turn complex requirements into elegant digital solutions.

About.title: About Me
About.p1: Information Engineering undergraduate at Semarang University (2025) with experience as a Web Developer through the Ministry of Manpower's MagangHub program at PT Environesia Global Saraya (Nov 2025 – May 2026).
About.p2: During my studies, I was also involved in the MBKM program and various application development projects, including a procurement system for a government agency.
About.p3: I have built end-to-end applications like the CBDMS Workspace, a task management system with an interactive Kanban board, task dependencies, multi-tenancy, and a real-time dashboard using Firestore.
About.p4: Experienced in developing and integrating HR, CRM, and financial systems, I leverage AI to assist in solution analysis and accelerate the development process, always prioritizing code quality and collaboration using tools like Git in an Agile environment.

Projects.title: Featured Projects
Projects.description: A selection of projects I've worked on, showcasing my skills and expertise.

cbdms.title: CBDMS Workspace
cbdms.description: A web-based task management system with an interactive Kanban board, task dependencies, and a real-time dashboard.

hr.title: HR Platform System
hr.description: An HR system to manage recruitment, employee data, and multi-level approval processes.

crm.title: CRM System
crm.description: A CRM system for monitoring sales activity and performance, including API integrations.

procurement.title: Goods Procurement System
procurement.description: A website for the Blitar Regency to manage data and transactions for public procurement.

wordpress.title: WordPress Development
wordpress.description: Created and managed websites and landing pages using Elementor for content and event marketing.

ecommerce.title: Financial System Application
ecommerce.description: A complete financial system solution with transaction management, reporting, and dashboard analytics.

Skills.title: Skills & Expertise
Skills.description: The technologies and tools I use to bring ideas to life.

Approach.title: My Working Approach
Approach.description: My approach to every project ensures high-quality, efficient results.
Approach.p1: I focus not just on coding, but on how the system addresses real-world user needs.
Approach.p2: I build applications with a structured approach, considering efficiency, usability, and scalability.
Approach.p3: I utilize AI to speed up the development process, assist in solution exploration, and boost overall productivity.

Contact.title: Get In Touch
Contact.description: I'm always open to discussing new projects, collaborations, or employment opportunities. Feel free to reach out.
